currentFocus: Close and push the hardened playable First Flight source truth, then generate contributor indexes and resume patch/mod, RE, and Lore quality work.

currentDocsTruth.release: v1.0.9 remains the latest published unsigned portable WinUI ZIP with 949 packaged Lore documents; this source slice does not publish a release.
currentDocsTruth.product: WinUI 3 is the primary preservation/modding GUI. The separate GPL rebuild has a deterministic Core/headless verifier and one playable procedural Godot .NET First Flight client; Electron, WPF, and the old Python GUI/CLI remain archived references.
currentDocsTruth.winUiFirstUse: CURRENT_CAPABILITIES.md and its byte-identical Lore mirror record the verified three-state setup hierarchy, preservation of temporarily unavailable remembered folders, manual Save Lab availability, shell status/focus ownership, Level 1 headings, compact wrapped source actions, truthful launch/Admin Level preset state, and demand-loaded Media VLC behavior.
currentDocsTruth.filesystemSafety: Save/options and generated asset/package outputs use bounded roots, held identities, guarded writes, final verification, and explicit same-user post-finalization limits.
currentDocsTruth.re: reverse-engineering/ is canonical; static Ghidra closure remains evidence input rather than automatic runtime or rebuild proof.
currentDocsTruth.lore: The 949-document package count proves packaged breadth, not editorial completeness, freshness, provenance/rights review, or broad public-safety approval.
currentDocsTruth.rebuild: The GPL-3.0-or-later RE-informed source rebuild now includes the deterministic net8 Core/headless verifier, pure real-time Client adapter, and playable procedural Godot 4.7 First Flight view. The source client needs no retail payload and is not in the published v1.0.9 WinUI ZIP. Current evidence covers exact replay/state hashes, two native viewport sizes, heuristic semantic rendered anchors, a synthetic Godot notification-handler probe, kernel-owned Job Object cleanup, and a fixed verified toolchain cache. The rendered-frame checks are regression heuristics, not tamper-resistant or independent visual proof; the evidence does not prove retail content/parity, a real OS focus transition, strict clean-room status, or same-user sandbox isolation.
currentDocsTruth.curatedSourcePackage: The curated artifact is a self-contained, plain non-Git convenience package over the already-public canonical repo, not a replacement checkout or a private/public legal cut. Current tracked accounting selects 721 source files and excludes the real game-generated save baseline; the exact terminal-commit candidate inventory and standalone gates remain pending for this slice.

activeBlockers: CURRENT_CAPABILITIES.md and reverse-engineering/RE-INDEX.md remain too large for fast contributor orientation.
release/readiness/ and tools/ still need generated front-door indexes before broad movement or deletion.
Lore needs an explicit editorial allowlist, third-party-text inventory, rights/provenance review, and generated canonical projections before another release.
The grouped WinUI action/reaction map still needs a verified control-by-control refresh against the current GUI.
nextSteps: Run final broad source gates and follow-up review, export and validate the exact terminal-commit 721-file candidate, then commit and push the hardened First Flight slice without publishing a release.
Generate contributor front-door indexes before reorganizing large RE, tools, or release trees.
Run the deep Lore and RE quality passes after the runnable rebuild foundation is accepted.
